title: We Added Each Other
text: Rudra added me on Snapchat, I added him back.

title: First Message
text: He messaged me for the first time, after waiting to see my face snaps.

title: You Are Beautiful
text: We talked more, and he said he found me beautiful and wanted to take our friendship further.

title: First I Love You
text: After a deep conversation, he first said "I love you."

title: First Meeting in Faridabad
text: We met in Faridabad, spending 6-7 hours together in the car; it was our first meeting.

title: He Came Again
text: He kept saying he wanted to meet again, and he surprised me by coming over.

title: Office Visit
text: He visited me for the first time at my office.

title: First Movie Date
text: We went on our first movie date together.

title: Rose in Faridabad
text: I went to Faridabad for college, and Rudra surprised me with a rose.

title: The Plans We Missed
text: We planned to meet, but I fell ill, and he had an accident, so we couldn’t.

title: Our First Night Together
text: We met again outside, for a stay overnight—our first night together.

title: Birthday Surprise
text: He surprised me for my birthday; we got drunk for the first time.

title: Our Biggest Fight
text: We had our biggest fight, lasting 2-3 months, though we didn’t break up.

title: We Grew Closer
text: Things smoothed out, and we grew closer.

title: Dreams of Japan
text: I encouraged him to go to Japan for a better future.

title: COE Arrived
text: He received his COE, and now he’s planning his move to Japan.
